treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Initial dosing was scheduled in cycles, changed to every other week due to complications.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Initially improved, then tumor markers began to rise slowly.
Patient was treated from ___ to ___ without progression of disease.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Dilaudid 1mg IV initially, later transitioned to MScontin 10mg PO BID.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Pain was initially relieved with IV dilaudid, well tolerated on discharge.
Reported to have helped with the pain.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient underwent celiac nerve plexus block.
CyberKnife radiation treatment held after 2 cycles due to complications.
Patient was restarted on Gemcitabine after restaging CT scan.
Change in pain management regimen to long-acting morphine (MScontin).

patient_outcome.final_status: Under hospice care, experiencing cancer-related pain.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient is to follow up with hospice service for pain management.
patient_outcome.complications: Anemia and thrombocytopenia complications were noted.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: New lung mass concerning for metastatic disease.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reports pain related to cancer and managed through hospice services.
